remarks: SELLER REQUESTS HIGHEST AND BEST BY 7/15 AT 5PM. This bright + open 6th floor studio in the pulse of vibrant downtown Stamford is is remarkably spacious, filled with windows ~ flooded with sunshine + possibility! Aggressively priced and presented as a canvas to create your perfect space featuring an open living/dining area, fabulous cityscape and some water views, galley kitchen and separate bath, you'll find plenty of storage and closets too. The well-managed Crosswinds community has low monthly fees and no assessments. Monthly fees include heat, hot water, management and assigned parking is an additional $20.00. This is a perfect home, ideal investment or can be both.
